creator: jonc@chen.org.nz
text:
Hi,

Would it be terribly bad if the port were to revert back to
NO_STAGE=yes? I've tried to figure out how the "jb" program works, but
got lost digging for a way to implement staging support.

A local version with staging support removed installs and works as expected.

Cheers.
-- 
Jonathan Chen <jonc@chen.org.nz>
